name: Butter Chunk Cinnamon Rolls (Bisquick)
recipeInstructions: PREHEAT OVEN TO 425°F. GREASE A SQUARE PAN. CUT THE COLD BUTTER INTO 1/4-inch CUBES. TOSS THE BISQUICK AND BUTTER CUBES UNTIL WELL COATED. BEAT THE MILK AND EGG; STIR INTO THE BAKING MIX. TURN DOUGH OUT ONTO A SURFACE COATED GENEROUSLY WITH BAKING MIX. ROLL DOUGH TO COAT WELL. KNEAD AND FOLD TEN TIMES. ROLL DOUGH INTO A RECTANGLE, ABOUT 15 X 8". SPREAD THE MELTED BUTTER OVER THE DOUGH. SPRINKLE WITH MIXED CINNAMON AND SUGAR. ROLL THE DOUGH STARTING AT THE 15-inch SIDE. CUT INTO 12 PIECES. PLACE IN THE PREPARED PAN, CUT SIDE DOWN. BAKE UNTIL GOLDEN. SPREAD WITH GLAZE MADE FROM 1 cup POWDERED SUGAR AND 1 TABLESPOON MILK.
